input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule D.10.3.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: d.10.3.1
            TITLE: cones (doo)

            CONTENT:
            rule D.10.3.1: Cones (DOO)
D.10.3.1 Cones (DOO) 
A 0.125 second penalty for each DOO (including entry and exit gate cones) on that run

final_answer: rule D.10.3.1: Cones (DOO) D.10.3.1 Cones (DOO) A 0.125 second penalty for each DOO (including entry and exit gate cones) on that run
